LanguageData.MF_SpawnDescription_Neolithic: Exiles wandering the world, cast out from old tribes or simply loners, have decided to unite. Their strength lies in their cohesion and knowledge of the wild lands.
LanguageData.MF_SpawnDescription_Medieval: Survivors have organized a new community with strict laws and walls made of debris. They reject the chaos of the wastes and build order on their own terms.
LanguageData.MF_SpawnDescription_Industrial: Scattered groups of survivors, bonded by a shared past and knowledge of industrial technologies. These shards of a former civilization are united by an iron will and a single goal — to forge a path to rebirth through fire and machines.
LanguageData.MF_SpawnDescription_Spacer: Space refugees whose ship crashed on the planet. They cling to the remnants of civilization, using wreckage for survival and recovery.
LanguageData.MF_SpawnDescription_Ultra: Shards of a once-great star empire. Their belief in their own superiority has only strengthened in isolation; acting from the shadows and appearing seemingly out of nowhere, their goals remain hidden from us.
LanguageData.MF_SpawnFlavor_2: How will this affect the balance of power?
LanguageData.MF_SpawnFlavor_4: Traders are already showing interest in them.
LanguageData.MF_SpawnFlavor_5: Where did these outsiders come from?
LanguageData.MF_SpawnFlavor_7: What are they looking for here?
LanguageData.MF_IndependenceLetterText_Hostile_Advanc: An explosive growth in power! During the uprising, the settlement {2} not only broke away from faction {1}, but also managed to secure rare equipment and knowledge, making a sharp leap in its development. Now the new group {0} is much better armed than its former masters. Relations: {3}.
LanguageData.MF_IndependenceLetterText_Neutral_Advanc: A qualitative leap from the shadows. The settlement {2} peacefully separated from faction {1}, revealing its new capabilities and hidden resources. It is now an independent and more advanced group: {0}. Relations: {3}.
LanguageData.MF_IndependenceLetterText_Ally_Advance: An era of prosperity! Faction {1} granted autonomy to settlement {2}, which has made an incredible breakthrough in its endeavors. Now {0} is a technologically strengthened ally, ready to conquer new heights. Relations: {3}.
LanguageData.MF_IndependenceLetterText_Hostile_Regres: Loss of supply and chaos! After separating from {1}, settlement {2} faced a serious decline. Deprived of the support and resources of their former comrades, the separatists of group {0} were forced to simplify their way of life and switch to more accessible equipment. Relations: {3}.
LanguageData.MF_IndependenceLetterText_Neutral_Regres: Forced simplification. The peaceful split from {1} cost the residents of settlement {2} dearly. Without external support, they could not maintain a complex way of life and moved to simpler survival methods: {0}. Relations: {3}.
LanguageData.MF_IndependenceLetterText_Ally_Regress: Hard times. Although faction {1} granted independence to {2}, the new settlers of {0} faced a shortage of resources and the loss of complex technologies. They have moved to a lower level of development but still require the support of their allies. Relations: {3}.
LanguageData.MF_IndependenceLetterText_Hostile: Civil war! Settlement {2} has rebelled against the influence of faction {1} and proclaimed itself an independent force: {0}.\n\nNegotiations failed, and now former compatriots have become sworn enemies. Relations: {3}.
LanguageData.MF_IndependenceLetterText_Neutral: Settlement {2} has officially announced its withdrawal from faction {1}. The division of territories took place without bloodshed, and a new sovereign group is now based here: {0}.\n\nRelations between them are assessed as {3}.
LanguageData.MF_IndependenceLetterText_Ally: Friendly separation! Faction {1} granted full autonomy to settlement {2} so that it could develop independently as a new allied faction: {0}.\n\nThey continue to support each other and remain loyal comrades. Relations: {3}.
LanguageData.MF_IndependenceLetterText_Default: Settlement {2} of faction '{1}' has declared itself an independent state named '{0}'.\n\nRelations: {3}.
